channel.title: vertx on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in vertx on Frank Huang

item.title: Learning Vertx by building Microservices
item.description: It’s been a long time for not writing technical blogs. Recently I’ve been working on how to store geo data and query routing result efficiently. Due to the historical issue, we chose Vertx as the back bone framework out of the consideration of concurrency. So starting today, I will keep on writing about how I learn and apply it to the real problems I came across and document them. How to write micro service CompositeFuture how get result from it?
